My name is XXXX XXXX, and I called Barclays at XXXX to resolve this issue. Someone in the fraud department stated that they were going to audit my account and have the issue resolved within ten days. That was on XX/XX/XXXX. The person in the fraud department promised to have the issue resolved in ten days. It has not been fixed. I have not used the card in over a year. All these charges are fraudulent. Barclays has neglected to correct this issue. This has negatively impacted my credit. I hope to restore my credit after this is all completed.
